summary: Addressed the final-review selected-context preservation blocker by keeping one-level-down NiceGUI diagnostic context in live view state instead of recomputing defaults during timer-driven live region rebuilds.
tasks_completed: Persisted selected round detail tab in NiceGUI session state and wired tab changes through NiceGUI on_change callbacks.
Persisted selected troubleshooting source and runtime/troubleshooting expansion state across live timer refresh repaints.
Removed the visible explanatory UX-constraint copy from the runtime/troubleshooting view touched by this fix.
Added focused fixture coverage proving selected tab, selected source, and expander state survive a refresh that repaints the live region.
tests_run: uv run python -m py_compile scripts/web_app_hub.py scripts/test-web-app-hub.py
